parts.text: {"family":"Hofmann-Loffler-Freytag Reaction","candidate":{"candidate_id":"C2","substrate_smiles":["CCCCN(C)Cl"],"product_smiles":["CN1CCCC1"],"optional_reagent_smiles":["O=S(=O)(O)O"],"rationale":"Canonical HLF reaction. N-chloroamine undergoes acid-catalyzed intramolecular C-H amination via a nitrogen radical to form a pyrrolidine ring.","collision_avoidance_note":"Avoids Barton-like motifs. Focuses on the core N-haloamine to cyclic amine transformation under acidic conditions, distinct from radical halogenation."}}
